fields.title: Core backbone outage during coordinated cyber incident
fields.scenario: Single national backbone outage affecting government and banking services.
fields.response_plan: Implement diversified failover, update crisis escalation matrix, and run tabletop exercise.

fields.title: National Cyber Contingency Plan
fields.scope: Cross-sector cyber incidents impacting essential services
fields.communication_procedure: Initial alert through CERT and national crisis coordination cell.
fields.coordination_mechanism: Government-led coordination with sector focal points and CI owners.
fields.information_sharing_protocol: Two-way threat and incident intelligence sharing across affected stakeholders.
fields.activation_trigger: Critical or cross-sector cyber incident with national service disruption potential.

fields.name: National cyber incident coordination bridge
fields.activation_notes: Used for coordinated incident triage and decision support.

fields.title: Telecom and banking ransomware tabletop
fields.scenario: Simulated ransomware spread across telecom and banking interdependencies.
